text: Gate 17 Enhanced Obfuscation Detection: _check_obfuscation() detects (1) Unicode zero-width chars U+200B/200C/200D/FEFF, (2) Bidirectional override U+202A-202E/2066-2069, (3) Confusable homoglyphs, (4) Multi-layer Base64 decode (3 layers), (5) Hex-encoded sequences, (6) ROT13 (plaintext patterns only). Called after _scan_content(). 11 new tests added; 16 total Gate 17 tests pass. Note: test_framework.py line 10057 enforcer.py ImportError prevents full test runner from reaching Gate 17 section at line 10836.

Gate System Audit (2026-02-19): HIGH: Gate 17 dead code. MEDIUM: Gate 11 docstring inconsistency. LOW: Gates 11/12 double-save. INFO: Gate 8 dormant. ALL PASS: 17 gates exist, correct signatures, all import successfully.

experience_archive.py: CSV (timestamp, error_type, gate_id, fix_strategy, outcome, file, duration_s), thread-safe fcntl locks. API: record_fix(), query_best_strategy(), get_success_rate(), get_archive_stats(). Fail-open. 17/17 tests pass.

BOOT PIPELINE: 6 files (~848 lines). orchestrator.py: init ramdisk, load state, inject memories, extract context. context.py: errors, tests, quality, duration. memory.py: ChromaDB socket. maintenance.py: audit rotation. util.py: helpers. 20-step flow: init → audit → LIVE_STATE → inject → context → auto-tune → dashboard → reset.

_ensure_initialized() called by 9 MCP tools. _knowledge_graph/_ltp_tracker fail-open. No gate references. health_check() doesn't report. Safe: new SQLite columns/JSON keys. Caution: test files import private constants—renaming breaks tests.

ZeroBrain Tier 2 gates: ops_rate_limit (120s window, warn >40/min, block >60/min), ops_workspace_isolation (file claims, 30-min stale), ops_model_guard (tokens_used/budget, block >=95%). All smoke-tested OK.

"Bank-level marker consumption" misnomer: bank's is_emergency_unlocked() only READS state, never modifies. Actual consumption in stake program: Deactivate/GovernanceUnlock/EarlyUnlock calls consume_emergency_marker(). Lifecycle: governance creates PDA → transfers ownership to stake program → stake validates → consumes. No race: lamports=0 fails validation.
v2.3.8 sprint (3 features, 12 tests): error_normalizer (3 patterns: port/memsize/traceback), auto_approve (12 SAFE_COMMAND_PREFIXES), gate_06_save_fix (STALE_FIX_SECONDS=1200). All passed first try.
Token costs: Claude 7.8k, Agent Zero 9.85k, Torus 18.69k, Megaman 19.1k. Breakdown: platform 14.55k (77%), framework 4.54k (23%). Key: framework +1.3k tokens across 4 versions.
agent-bench suite: 174 tests, 0.98s. conftest/test_adapters/test_scorer/test_runner/test_reporter + 9 categories. DummyAdapter: reliability>50, tokens>80, memory>50, speed>80, consistency>80.

Session 243: GitHub docs overhaul. Audit: clean, no leaked data. Fixed ChromaDB→LanceDB. Updated stats (119 files, 50K lines). 22 toggles documented. README redesigned. MIT→Apache-2.0. Removed diagrams. teams/ excluded via .gitignore.

6-branch comparison (2026-02-27): refactor-test (5.481 tests, 17 gates), Sprint3 (5.463 tests), evolution-branch (1.481 tests), Self-Sprint-2 (1.413 tests), self-evolve-test (248 files), master-backup (oldest).
GitHub workflow: scrubbed /home/crab paths, UID 1000→getuid(), added sentence-transformers, install.sh, simplified README. Gotchas: Gate 2 blocks force push, xoxb- scanner, WebFetch stale cache.
Branch sync: refactor-test (v2.5.8, 80+ commits) vs github-branch (v2.5.8, docs cherry-picked). Major: test split, project-memory-tagging, concurrent safety, MCP global scope, memory improvements.

Enforcer hook (enforcer.py): PreToolUse (5s, 8 gates, exit 1 if blocked), PostToolUse (3s, track state). Always-allowed: Read/Glob/Grep/WebSearch/MCP/tasks. Per-session state isolation. Atomic writes. Fail-closed Tier 1.
